opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I was watching a surgery scene on TV, my stomach flipped, my vision tunneled, and the next thing I knew I was on the floor.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I passed out and fell while watching TV and my partner is really shaken up — we want to make sure I'm okay and that I didn't hurt my head.

symptom_narrative.onset: suddenly, while sitting and watching a graphic surgery scene on television about half an hour ago
symptom_narrative.duration: was out for well under a minute, then came round quickly; now feels drained
symptom_narrative.character: felt my stomach flip, went really hot and sweaty, then my vision tunnelled and there was a roaring/ringing in my ears, and then I was on the floor
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: frightening in the moment, but I feel physically fine now, just wiped out
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: whole-body — the faint feeling, not pain anywhere
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: one single episode; came round within about 20 seconds of lying flat
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: lying down flat — I woke up quickly once I was on my back
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: the sight of the surgery on the screen seemed to set it off, and the room was very warm
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: nausea, heavy sweating, feeling very hot, tunnel vision and ringing ears just before it happened; no chest pain and I don't think my heart was racing
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this before — this is the first time I've ever passed out
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: fully alert now, resting on the sofa, just feel washed-out and tired

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with spouse, who witnessed the event and is very anxious about how sudden it was

objective_data_offered.value: spouse says he went very pale, went limp and slid to the carpet, and came round within about 20 seconds once he was lying flat
he sank down onto the carpet rather than striking his head hard; no cut, no bump felt, no bleeding seen
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: bystander impression only — a head strike cannot be excluded from this description

objective_data_offered.value: says he feels fully awake and knows where he is, just tired and washed-out; no chest pain, no headache right now
